programme.title: The World Today

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. It presents 360 degree profiles of industry movers and shakers, tech mavericks and policymakers, and drills down on the stories behind their success, to give you clarity on what’s happening in every facet of business.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China’s rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country’s culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: The World Today

programme.title: Leaders Talk

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation.

programme.title: Big Story
programme.desc: Big Story is a documentary film program on CGTN. It explores global events with in a variety of filmic styles and featuring original, in-depth, thought-provoking storytelling.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Travelogue
programme.desc: Travelogue is a 30-minute travel program. Through the journeys of our intrepid hosts, we experience the beauty, culture and mystery of China, discovering how people live in this vast country and showcasing China's transformation to the world.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already "living in the future"!

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN's Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China’s rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country’s culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: Due di denarI
programme.desc: Debora Rosciani e Mauro Meazza sono i "Due di denari", la carta giusta da giocare per rendere più semplici la gestione dei risparmi, i rapporti con il fisco e la burocrazia, la comprensione dei movimenti di Borsa, del mondo del lavoro, dei diritti dei consumatori.

programme.title: La Zanzara

programme.title: Nessun luogo è lontano

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E12 - Axel and Chains
programme.desc: When Wardens respond to a call sometimes getting there is most of the battle. And we pay tribute to an honorary warden that will truly be missed.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E13 - Stolen Future
programme.desc: Montana Game Wardens have their hands full with headless deer, trophy bull elk poaching and illegally tagged deer.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S01:E08 - Closing Time
programme.desc: An unexpected storm leaves Island Air struggling to pull their planes for mandatory maintenance.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S02:E01 - Ice Climbers
programme.desc: Tanalian Aviation battles winter weather to ferry ice climbers onto the Knik Glacier.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue - S01:E07 - Swoop and Scoop
programme.desc: Wiedie and Chris designed their lives so they can experience all Jackson Hole has to offer. And when a young snowmobiler's first ride into the backcountry spins out of control, they join forces with Jess and Flip to execute a perfect 'swoop and scoop' rescue.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue - S01:E08 - No Short Cuts
programme.desc: Tim demands a lot of everyone around him, especially during a cave rescue, which he describes as the worst kind of rescue.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E08 - Princess Diana The Uncrowned Queen
programme.desc: This show offers a captivating look into the extraordinary life of one of the 20th century's most fascinating women, seen through an American lens. It features clips from the auction where her dresses were sold.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E24 - The Queen Her True Story
programme.desc: The story of an extraordinary woman and her incredible life.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E07 - William And Kate Into The Future
programme.desc: From a regular student to a royal girlfriend, Kate Middleton has transformed into a real-life princess. In less than ten years, this everyday girl with a normal background captured her prince's heart and is now on track to become the future Queen of England.

programme.title: Dropped - S07:E09 - The End
programme.desc: In the exciting season finale, Chris lays it all on the line one last time while bear hunting. Casey must finish one final task to make the fruits of their labor worthwhile. As the brothers inch closer to safety, they wonder what the future holds.

programme.title: Dropped - S07:E10 - Reca
programme.desc: Dive deep into the season of Dropped as the brothers recap an epic 30 day adventure through the Canadian Bush.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue - S01:E08 - No Short Cuts
programme.desc: Tim demands a lot of everyone around him, especially during a cave rescue, which he describes as the worst kind of rescue.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E08 - Princess Diana The Uncrowned Queen
programme.desc: This show offers a captivating look into the extraordinary life of one of the 20th century's most fascinating women, seen through an American lens. It features clips from the auction where her dresses were sold.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E24 - The Queen Her True Story
programme.desc: The story of an extraordinary woman and her incredible life.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E07 - William And Kate Into The Future
programme.desc: From a regular student to a royal girlfriend, Kate Middleton has transformed into a real-life princess. In less than ten years, this everyday girl with a normal background captured her prince's heart and is now on track to become the future Queen of England.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E12 - Axel and Chains
programme.desc: When Wardens respond to a call sometimes getting there is most of the battle. And we pay tribute to an honorary warden that will truly be missed.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E13 - Stolen Future
programme.desc: Montana Game Wardens have their hands full with headless deer, trophy bull elk poaching and illegally tagged deer.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E08 - Princess Diana The Uncrowned Queen
programme.desc: This show offers a captivating look into the extraordinary life of one of the 20th century's most fascinating women, seen through an American lens. It features clips from the auction where her dresses were sold.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E09 - Queen Camilla
programme.desc: The documentary Queen Camilla? takes a closer look at Camilla Parker-Bowles, covering her history, her life, and what lies ahead. It focuses on her long standing ties with Prince Charles. The film also delves into the drama around Camilla's role in Prince Charles's marriage to Princess Diana.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E12 - The New Royals
programme.desc: Princesses Beatrice and Eugenie have gone through a lot of media attention and tough situations in their lives. From their parents' very public split to being targeted by the press, they've been through quite a bit. Despite all this, they remain dedicated to supporting the monarchy with their charity work. Through serving the Commonwealth, both sisters continue to make a positive impact.

programme.title: Dropped - S08:E01 - Back In The Brooks
programme.desc: For the first time in years, the Keefer Brothers set foot on the gravel roads of remote Alaska.

programme.title: Dropped - S08:E02 - Maniac Mountain
programme.desc: More than ten years on, Maniac Mountain gives the brothers another groundbreaking achievement.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E14 - Night Chase
programme.desc: With a massive winter storm bearing down on Northern Montana, Wardens aren't backing off. Wardens catch one guy in a web of lies at a check station, while miles away they chase down a decoy shooter that refuses to give up.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E15 - Wasted Dummy
programme.desc: Warden Lesofski looks for those who left elk to rot. Region 2 Wardens get into a situation dealing with their decoy being shot.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S02:E02 - Without a Trace
programme.desc: Tanalian Aviation pilots Joel Natwick and Josiah Freeman assist with a search and rescue for an experienced hiker deep in the winter wilderness.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S02:E03 - Salvage: Gone-Awry
programme.desc: Joel and Mark Barker tempt fate and fly into no man's land to find and salvage a white airplane in a snowy forest all while fighting hypothermia along the way.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E01 - Riggins Gold
programme.desc: Today on Gold Fever join Tom and his daughter Kia, are on the mighty Salmon River, doing some underwater metal detecting, looking for gold nuggets.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E02 - Blue Bucket Oregon Trail
programme.desc: Today on Gold Fever join Tom and his daughter Kia, are on the Oregon trail, hunting for the legendary Blue Bucket Mine.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E11 - Royal Children Prince William and Prince Harry
programme.desc: Two young men who have had to cope with extraordinarily challenging events and circumstances as, together, they have gone on to change the face of the British royal family and carve meaningful roles for themselves in the modern world. Made in 1999 two years after the death of their mother, Princess Diana, this original and touching documentary examines the lives of the royal princes, the legacy of their mother, the responsibilities of being a royal - and what the future holds for them.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E13 - William And Kate One Year On
programme.desc: William and Catherine got married in a fairytale ceremony on April 29, 2011, with more than two billion people tuning in and celebrations happening all around the world.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E43 - Diana A Day In The Life
programme.desc: When Diana got engaged, she was constantly in the media's eyes. Throughout her life, she focused on her sons and committed herself to charity work, like speaking out against land mines. Diana used her fame to bring attention to this and other important issues. This well-researched show takes a closer look at one of the 20th century's most amazing people. With never-before-seen footage, it shows her path from a shy teen to becoming the beloved Diana, Princess of Wales, including touching moments from her last days.

programme.title: Dropped - S08:E03 - Arctic Apex
programme.desc: The Keefer brothers end up in a showdown between a grizzly and a wolf, challenging who's really at the top of the food chain.

programme.title: Dropped - S08:E04 - Valley Of Riches
programme.desc: Animals are all around us, but that doesn't make things easy.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E16 - Minor Mistakes
programme.desc: A riverside check station catches four minors with no life jackets and a lot of alcohol.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Stop me if you heard this one before? What's fast, windy, and can ruin your day in seconds? Of course, we're talking about the weather. And over the next half hour, we'll be bringing you some of the craziest moments ever captured on camera; from hailstorms to tornados and everything in between, we're going to show it all, right here on Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Buckle up, folks, because we're headed straight into the eye of the hurricane, the mouth of the volcano, and the depths of the flood, and we're doing it all right here, on another episode of Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Today's forecast is a doozy! Wind, followed by hail, and then with a bit of a hurricane for good measure.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: The wind whips and rain is pours, but you're not in the elements- you're watching Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Weather has always been here, from long before arrived, and it will stick around long after we are gone. This unstoppable force has both enhanced and ruined people's days since the dawn of time...but it also creates some incredible situations. Lucky for you, we've captured some of the best for you to see. Strap in and prepare yourself, because it's time once again for Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Here at Extreme Weather Countdown, no natural phenomenon is too crazy, and we've returned with an episode chock-full of footage from the eye of the storm. Settle in, because there are rough seas ahead.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Today's countdown will give you a front row seat to weather phenomena from around the globe!

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: Volcanic ash engulfing a town, a massive firenado in California - just some of the viral weather videos caught on camera in this episode of Captured, as Vicious Winds take center stage.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: El Niño is a temperature anomaly in the Pacific Ocean that affects weather patterns around the globe. In this episode we show some of the costly and deadly weather that can result when a Super El Niño occurs.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: In these viral videos we witness how, in the blink of an eye, your day can become suddenly dangerous. Even on a beautiful day, when you're not expecting any severe weather at all, Mother Nature can sometimes be malicious and sneaky

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: A catastrophic earthquake, a mesmerizing avalanche, a destructive tornado, and an unintentional smashup derby on icy highways; our experts weigh in on these viral videos as people get caught off guard by the sudden and powerful forces of nature.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: We always take weather for granted, but when Mother Nature turns up the heat, she forces us to pay attention.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Destructive tornadoes and ferocious winds are only two elements Mark and Jaclyn encounter when storm hunting.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Mark hikes up Mount Washington, New Hampshire, the highest peak in the Northeastern US and battles one of the most dangerous mountains in the world at its peak intensity.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Flames Fill the sky. An entire city flees in terror. Firefighters bravely rush in.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Adventurer George Kourounis’ patience is tested as he encounters deadly wildlife and challenging elements while preparing to descend into Marum Volcano in the South Pacific.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Mark and Jaclyn make their annual trek to Tornado Alley and this time they are looking for more than severe thunderstorms and tornadoes. They also want answers as to whether Climate Change is causing changes to Tornado Alley.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Doubt and disbelief plague the Stormhunters after an exhaustive chase through Tornado Alley. The team is forced to make an uncomfortable decision. Do they play it safe or push past their fear?

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Will perilous conditions put the Stormhunters in the line of danger as the violent storm spins out of control?

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: While in Nepal, the Stormhunters receive unexpected news that literally takes this trip to the next level. They contend with mountainous terrain, adverse weather and altitude sickness in their quest to glimpse Earth's highest mountain.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Canada’s weather is complex and powerful! Mark and fellow storm hunters chase down avalanches in British Columbia’s back country, twisters in Saskatchewan, and hurricane scale storms in Newfoundland. Enduring extreme weather is just an ordinary day for the True North Strong.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: The Stormhunters find themselves knee deep in flood waters as historic rainfall threatens to wash them away.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: A white monster charges up the Eastern Seaboard, and 80 million citizens are in its path.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Stormhunters Mark and Jaclyn visit Canada's Arctic to see how the inhabitants live. Jaclyn also hopes to achieve one of her lifelong goals; to come face to face with a polar bear. Will she be able to cross this off her bucket list?

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: They're no strangers to nature’s extremes but Hurricanes Harvey and Irma test the Stormhunters.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Stormhunters embark on their most epic tornado chase ever, breaking their own records and catching once in a lifetime views. ⇥

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: George joins Mark and Jaclyn on a journey to Nepal.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Following an intense hurricane season, Hurricane Michael is poised to hit Florida.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Weather is an unrelenting force, tearing through our lives and homes, with no regard for the human condition. But lucky for us, these humans have been conditioned to take out their phones and record whatever is happening, letting us relive the experiences again and again. And when it comes to weather that is out of the ordinary, that's truly where we come alive. Strap in, because you're about to get hit by an Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Brace yourself for unpredictable dust devils, mind blowing lightning shows, and glass shattering hail storms!

programme.desc: Take a look at instances of nature that prove that we have no control over it.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Another chase through the hotbed of wicked weather puts the storm hunters a little too close to the danger zone. Will Mark & Jaclyn see the tornado they’re hoping for before it’s too late?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2002, l'impresario funebre Lonnie Turner Sr. fu trovato colpito a morte. Il figlio Lonnie Jr. diventò il primo sospettato, specie dopo che si scoprì che l'omicidio venne commesso con la sua pistola. Tuttavia, aveva un alibi per l'ora del delitto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La donna sul retro del camion agitava le braccia e urlava. Pensavano stesse facendo qualcosa di pericoloso per il gusto di farlo. Ma quando trovarono una giacca vicino a una pozza di sangue, capirono che ciò che avevano visto non era una scorribanda.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando due donne scomparvero e in seguito furono ritrovate brutalmente assassinate, la polizia si chiese se fossero vittime di un crimine d'odio.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una giovane e attraente parrucchiera fu violentata e uccisa nel suo salone di bellezza. Le prove sul luogo del delitto non corrispondevano a nessuno dei sospettati e, dopo l'indagine iniziale, il caso rimase irrisolto per dieci anni.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, 35 anni, venne condannata per l'omicidio di David Nixon nell'aprile 2002 dopo che aveva pianificato di porre fine alla loro relazione.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2004, la studentessa di infermieristica Tamika Huston sparì dalla sua casa a Spartanburg, Sud Carolina. Una soffiata portò gli investigatori alla sua macchina e trovarono chiavi di casa ignote che avrebbero potuto aiutare a risolvere il caso.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2008, l'universitaria Jenna Verhaalen fu trovata morta nel suo appartamento a Bryan, in Texas, e le emorragie petecchiali nei suoi occhi indicavano che era stata strangolata.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Indagando su un brutale omicidio, la scientifica aveva chiara una cosa: l'assassino conosceva la vittima.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fu uno dei casi più insoliti nella storia forense. Gli investigatori dovevano trovare un modo per risolvere un caso di omicidio con prove composte da un pomodoro schiacciato trovato sul luogo del delitto e piccoli riflessi di luce in una foto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una giovane e attraente parrucchiera fu violentata e uccisa nel suo salone di bellezza. Le prove sul luogo del delitto non corrispondevano a nessuno dei sospettati e, dopo l'indagine iniziale, il caso rimase irrisolto per dieci anni.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, 35 anni, venne condannata per l'omicidio di David Nixon nell'aprile 2002 dopo che aveva pianificato di porre fine alla loro relazione.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una guardia di sicurezza è scomparsa dalla sua postazione senza lasciare traccia. I suoi resti furono ritrovati un anno dopo in un campeggio sperduto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1999, Susan Fassett fu freddata mentre lasciava le prove del coro della chiesa a Poughkeepsie, New York. Il marito Jeff diventò il primo sospettato finché non lo scagionò la polizia, che sospettava di Fred Andros, con cui Susan aveva una storia.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Il 12 maggio 1994, Crystal Perry fu brutalmente assassinata nella sua casa a Bridgton, nel Maine. Michael Hutchinson, 32 anni, fu dichiarato colpevole di omicidio.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Alla vigilia di Natale del 2005, il corpo di un uomo nero viene trovato bruciato vicino a Baltimora. È poi identificato come Wesley Person, 26enne. I tipici materiali edili anni '30 trovati vicino al corpo sono un ruolo chiave per risolvere il caso.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La polizia ricava un indizio su una coppia scomparsa nel weekend del Memorial Day durante una rapina in corso. Le prove trovate risolvono un crimine brutale.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La mattina prima di Natale, una studentessa universitaria fu rapita dal parcheggio del suo appartamento.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quanto può essere sfortunato un uomo? Sua moglie si è tolta la vita e la sua fidanzata del college si uccise allo stesso modo quattordici anni prima. Gli investigatori dovevano stabilire se si trattasse solo di una strana coincidenza o di un delitto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una studentessa dell'ultimo anno è stata trovata violentata e uccisa vicino a un sentiero sterrato usato dagli studenti per camminare da un lato all'altro del campus.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Un vicedirettore di una steakhouse della Florida viene pugnalato a morte. Sembra essere una rapina andata male, ma un'impronta insanguinata rivela che conosceva il suo assassino.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2003, Jason MacLennan tornò a casa e trovò il corpo di suo padre Ken disteso in una pozza di sangue.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Dopo aver sparato alla testa delle vittime, l'assassino ha inscenato la scena del crimine, ha messo le prove incriminanti in un sacchetto di plastica e le ha gettate nel fiume.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2004, Mary Ann Clibbery è stata trovata brutalmente assassinata nella sua attività in Illinois e gli investigatori hanno dovuto stabilire se si trattasse di una rapina andata male o di un omicidio calcolato.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2005, David Castor subì una morte lenta e straziante nell'arco di giorni. Sua moglie Stacey sosteneva che si trattasse di suicidio, anche se era stato eseguito con l'antigelo.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nella notte di Halloween del 2004, Adriane Insogna e Leslie Mazzara furono brutalmente uccise nella loro casa di Napa, in California.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2007, la casa mobile di Effie e Michael Ratley prese fuoco e Michael salvò la moglie e il figlio neonato.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In poco più di un mese due donne che vivevano nello stesso complesso residenziale furono brutalmente uccise. Le analogie delle scene del crimine portarono la polizia a pensare si trattasse di un serial killer che covava un forte odio verso le donne.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Dopo che il sospetto fu accusato di incendio doloso e delitto, sostenne la sua innocenza ma fu condannato a 25 anni di galera. Ricorse a testi legali nella biblioteca del carcere e a programmi di scienza forense e decise di provare la sua innocenza.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando due donne scomparvero e in seguito furono ritrovate brutalmente assassinate, la polizia si chiese se fossero vittime di un crimine d'odio.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando una giovane ragazza venne trovata morta, la polizia arrestò subito il sospetto più probabile. Ma la tecnologia all'avanguardia della NASA permise a un odontoiatra forense di dimostrare che dietro le sbarre vi era l'uomo sbagliato.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1995, la cameriera di Palm Beach Denise O'Neill venne rapita e uccisa. Il suo vicino Luis Caballero destò sospetti per il suo strano comportamento nei confronti delle troupe televisive che riprendevano il crimine.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Due sospetti che convivono sono stati collegati a un omicidio per stivali macchiati di sangue e una pistola.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una giovane donna frequenta le funzioni religiose serali... poi scompare. Quando la sua auto abbandonata viene ritrovata, il serbatoio è vuoto e manca una tanica di benzina che teneva nel bagagliaio per le emergenze.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La vittima era benvoluta e di successo, il che rendeva ancora più difficile da capire la crudeltà del crimine.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2006, l'immobiliarista texana Sarah Anne Walker fu trovata brutalmente uccisa in una casa modello. Settimane dopo si presentò un testimone che forse vide il killer. La polizia usò l'ipnosi forense per fargli evocare i dettagli fisici dell'uomo.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La vittima era un self-made man che non ha mai usato mezzi termini. Forse è stato assassinato da un cliente o da un dipendente insoddisfatto. Forse le foto audaci nella sua cassaforte contenevano l'indizio per risolvere il crimine.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: I detective del Texas cercano di fermare il prima possibile un assassino che attacca le forze dell'ordine. Un singolo involucro di proiettile rivela il bizzarro movente dietro la vendetta dell'assassino.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Una giovane madre viene trovata assassinata nella sua casa. Ci sono inizialmente due sospettati con un movente, ma grazie un colloquio insolito e le riprese della telecamera di sicurezza, gli investigatori prendono una nuova terrificante direzione.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Un negozio di abbigliamento di lusso a Bethesda, Maryland, rivela una scena raccapricciante: una dipendente, 30 anni, viene trovata morta mentre il suo collega, 28 anni, è malconcio e legato. Le telecamere di sorveglianza fanno luce sul movente.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Un uomo anziano viene colpito e ucciso mentre era in viaggio. Gli omicidi casuali sono tra i più difficili da risolvere, ma la balistica offre un vantaggio agli investigatori.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Una giovane madre in salute muore misteriosamente dopo un piccolo incidente stradale, dando luogo a un'indagine sulla causa della sua morte.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Una donna viene uccisa in un parcheggio affollato in pieno giorno. Sembra un colpo da professionisti, ma le prove rivelano un piano elaborato.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Una famiglia piange l'inaspettata morte dell'amata nonna a Natale. La polizia locale assicura a tutti che si è trattato di un tragico incidente e non di un delitto. Ma alcune cose sulla scena non tornano.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Dopo che due operai sono stati uccisi in un cantiere, la polizia si concentra su un indizio importante.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1989, i cadaveri di Joan Rogers e delle due figlie adolescenti furono trovati a galleggiare a Tampa Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Detectives search for the bombers of two churches in Illinois, hoping that the materials used in the remnants of the handmade bombs will offer the clues to catch the culprits.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Il rapinatore sparò quando la famiglia di quattro persone entrò in casa, uccidendone due e ferendo gli altri. Aprì alcuni cassetti per far sembrare che si trattasse di una rapina, ma la scena del delitto era stata chiaramente preparata.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando una bamba di nove anni sparisce, polizia e volontari passano settimane a cercarla. La visione di un medium porta a un campo dove si scopre il corpo insieme a ciò che gli inquirenti sperano siano prove adeguate ad aiutarli a trovare il killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Un'auto crivellata di colpi, un autista scomparso e nessun testimone. Fu un agguato o un attacco casuale?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: L'assassino probabilmente sperava di coprire le proprie tracce inscenando la scena del crimine. Ma gli investigatori hanno visto il tentativo quasi subito e si sono rivolti alla scienza forense per scoprire cosa è realmente accaduto quella notte.

programme.desc: La vittima fu violentata e pugnalata a morte sulla spiaggia. Vicino al corpo venne ritrovato un paio di scarpe da tennis maschili. La polizia era sicura che se avesse trovato l'uomo delle scarpe, avrebbe trovato anche chi aveva commesso il delitto.

programme.desc: Nel 1996, la polizia di Virginia Beach arrivò nell'appartamento di Makdessi e trovò Elise Makdessi e il suo amante Quincy Brown morti.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1993, la giovane madre Tammy Tatum fu trovata violentata e uccisa nel suo appartamento di Longmont, in Colorado. La polizia inizialmente sospettò del suo ex marito, ma non aveva prove sufficienti per accusarlo e il caso è rimasto irrisolto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una ragazza viene trovata morta nel suo appartamento. Con poche prove sulla scena, il caso rimane irrisolto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1989, i cadaveri di Joan Rogers e delle due figlie adolescenti furono trovati a galleggiare a Tampa Bay.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Le squadre devono creare i piatti più deliziosi a base di formaggio al fine di vincere un'avventura in oceano.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef creano un servizio speciale a pranzo in onore di due enti di beneficenza gestiti dai vigili del fuoco di Los Angeles.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Questa volta, gli chef devono preparare un pasto greco

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Oggi, gli chef devono preparare un piatto usando una bevanda alcolica, chesia vino, birra o superalcolici.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Oggi, gli chef si trovano di fronte a una selezione di alimenti proteici esotici tra cui un alligatore.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: La sfida di oggi è preparare una cena di bentornato per il liceo Calabasas.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef servono un pasto composto di sei portate per due associazioni di beneficenza.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: È la serata delle bistecche, ma i continui errori di uno chef porteranno alla loro eliminazione?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Dopo una cena disastrosa, il suo agnello cotto alla perfezione potrà salvare Josh dal taglio?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef preparano delle portate in piccole porzioni per i partecipanti di una performance sinfonica privata.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Le emozioni sono alle stelle poiché ogni concorrente in gara fa un turno da capo chef.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Chi sarà presto a capo del proprio ristorante ora che l’annuncio del vincitore di quest’anno si avvicina?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: L'ospite al ristorante di Carlo Cracco è l'esperto Carlo Spinelli, che porta ingredienti insoliti come fiori, alghe, sali stranieri e insetti. I cuochi affrontano l'ardua sfida di creare un piatto con questi ingredienti, mettendoli in difficoltà con un menu azzardato per il pranzo.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: I cuochi delle due brigate trascorrono un pomeriggio avventuroso nella campagna pavese, raccogliendo ingredienti e cucinando in situazioni estreme per creare un piatto gourmet. Lo chef Cracco incontra i cuochi individualmente per valutarli e decidere l'immunità, mentre due chef prendono la guida della propria brigata.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Come primo test, i cuochi devono creare un piatto ispirato a un giocattolo. La squadra blu vince. Nel servizio del pranzo, i clienti votano i menu tramite un'app, ma nonostante sia il più popolare, il menu rosso riceve meno stelle, causando la sconfitta della squadra.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: I 6 chef rimanenti si avvicinano alla giacca nera. Nel primo test, preparano risotti che riflettono la loro identità, mentre Guglielmo e Shaban emergono come i migliori dei loro team. Guglielmo ottiene la prima giacca nera. Durante il servizio, i cuochi sono osservati da Bottura e alla fine, le giacche nere rimanenti vengono consegnate a Carlotta, Shaban, Kristian e Amalia in questo ordine.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Dopo una serata di "eccessi", i cuochi devono preparare piatti detox con Pierangelo Dacrema come ospite. Nel primo servizio con la giacca nera, i migliori cuochi delle prime due edizioni di "Hell's Kitchen Italia" sfidano i concorrenti con un menu dei migliori piatti delle tre edizioni.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I diciotto chef si dirigono a Las Vegas e cucinano il loro piatto forte prima di essere valutati.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Ci sarà il caos quando The Game e il suo entourage si presenteranno a una cena senza preavviso?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef devono fare una sfida di comunicazione. L'astronauta Buzz Aldrin partecipa alla cena.

programme.desc: Un servizio disastroso porta a un’eliminazione scioccante.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen

programme.desc: I dieci chef ancora in gara sono chiamati a creare piatti unici con ingredienti limitati.

programme.desc: Delle costate di manzo cotte non abbastanza portano una squadra a perdere la sfida.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Un Ramsay arrabbiato deve unire le squadre per finire il servizio.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Durante la preparazione dei tre antipasti, le squadre possono avere solo uno chef alla volta in cucina.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I sei chef in gara ricevono una visita dalle loro famiglie.

programme.desc: Dopo un servizio turbolento a cena, un furioso Gordon è costretto a prendere le redini in mano.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: I tre finalisti sono portati dalllo chef Cracco in un hotel di lusso, la Chesa Colani a Madulain, per preparare due piatti classici internazionali. Ma uno di loro deve lasciare Hell's Kitchen prima del servizio finale, che deciderà il nuovo Executive Chef.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Gale fa un ultimo sforzo per fermare Anvis, ma presto Lute si rende conto che deve combattere per salvare il nuovo alleato dal baratro, con l'aiuto di tutti.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Lute e i suoi amici hanno di fronte a sé un intero mondo da esplorare e un futuro luminoso. Mikhail comprende il significato della Fratellanza ottenendo un Palico e uno scopo nella vita.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: L'aspirante Rider, Lute, e i suoi amici vanno in cerca del Monstie Egg alla vigilia del Rito di Fratellanza. Le ricerche li condurranno verso territori pericolosi.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: È arrivato il momento del Rito di Fratellanza! Lilia e Cheval sono incerti sul loro futuro; intanto un attacco inaspettato al villaggio di Hakum costringe i Rider ad entrare in azione.

programme.title: Arthur e il popolo dei Minimei
programme.desc: Come un qualsiasi altro bambino di 10 anni, Arthur è affascinato dalle storie che sua nonna gli racconta prima di dormire. I suoi sogni sono popolati dalle tribù africane e dalle incredibili altre invenzioni descritte su un vecchio libro che apparteneva a suo nonno, misteriosamente scomparso.

programme.title: Giotto, l'amico dei pinguini
programme.desc: Giotto è un simpatico cagnolone, un bellissimo e dolcissimo pastore maremmano. Scodinzola per l’incantevole cittadina di Warrnambool, una località sul mare in Australia. Nella fattoria del suo padrone Swampy, ognuno ha il suo compito, e quello di Giotto è di fare la guardia alle galline.

programme.title: L'ape Maia il film
programme.desc: Sullo sfondo di una lotta secolare tra api e vespe, la piccola e anticonformista Maia nasce in un alveare dove non è facile essere diversi.

programme.title: Air Bud 5: un amico dal tocco magico
programme.desc: Buddy sta portando il suo show nelle spiaggie grazie ad un nuovo sport: il beach volley! La vita in spiaggia non è così rilassante come sembra. Un'ondata di furti misteriosi ha colpito la città e sono state trovate impronte di zampe sulle scene del crimine.

programme.title: Dubitando Di Thomas - Bugie E Spie
programme.desc: Thomas è un ragazzo conosciuto per la sua capacità di raccontare sempre frottole. Quando s’imbatte per sbaglio in un piano per rapire la figlia del Presidente, prova ad allertare le autorità.

programme.title: Gli acchiappamostri
programme.desc: Un’avventura soprannaturale per tutta la famiglia. Alex vuole aiutare il suo fratellino a smettere di avere incubi, quindi decide di formare una squadra per prendersi cura dei suoi mostri immaginari.

programme.title: Bogus - L'Amico Immaginario
programme.desc: Quando Albert va a vivere con Harriet Franklin, l'amica d'infanzia ferocemente indipendente di sua madre, non arriva da solo.

programme.title: Il ragazzo e il grande elefante

Qui rimane subito affascinato dalla natura selvaggia del continente. Durante un safari incontrerà un grande elefante con cui andrà incontro a emozionanti avventure.

programme.desc: Il villaggio di Hokum ripropone la "Monstie Gara" in onore dei quattro nuovi Rider, ma Lute ha ancora molta pratica da fare con il suo potente amico

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On

programme.title: New Rock And Metal Videos For You
programme.desc: Stay ahead of the curve with the freshest drops from the global underground. From world premieres to the latest studio masterpieces, we’ve gathered the newest sonic assaults in one place. If it’s loud and new, it’s here.

programme.title: From The Scene For The Scene
programme.desc: Go beyond the music and into the heart of the underground. This collection pairs heavy-hitting videos with exclusive band interviews and reports from metal capitals worldwide. Built by the scene, for the scene.

programme.title: Metal That Rocks
programme.desc: Where rock 'n' roll swagger meets the weight of metal. This collection bridges the gap, featuring everything from anthemic hard rock to core-shaking classics. It’s loud, it’s proud, and it’s built to move you.

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: Where Heavy Music Lives
programme.desc: Your official gateway to the underground. Discover your first distorted riff or find a circle of peers who "get it." Welcome to the neighborhood—it’s loud, it’s proud, and there’s always room for one more.

programme.title: The Art Of Destruction
programme.desc: Founded in 1982, DESTRUCTION is a "Big Three" titan of German thrash alongside Kreator and Sodom. With uncompromising music and high-energy shows, they’ve thrilled millions. Discover the story of a global force that helped define the genre.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 40th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Witness a sold-out milestone at Shepherd’s Bush Theatre. Wishbone Ash marks 40 years with a career-spanning set of legends and new hits, plus special guests. It’s a high-energy celebration of guitar-driven rock history.

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: The Wizard Of Sauce

programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford pulls back the curtain on veggie sauces! First up, a Provencal sauce tomate to go with halibut! Next, a rustic pepperonata with flank steak and a trio of pestos!

programme.title: Spice Secrets
programme.desc: From Fettuccine Alfredo to Meatloaf, everyday recipes are enjoyed every day for a reason: we love them! Chefs Shahir Massoud and Jasmin Ibrahim use spices to punch up these classic recipes. Meatloaf gets aromatic allspice, and is topped with bay leaf spiked ketchup. Fettuccine gets mustard; both the seed and the leafy green! Bacon and fried rice are ultimate comfort foods, but have you ever tried it with cardamom in the mix? Spice is the secret, a pinch of spice can make a world of difference!

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: Go-to Indian menu item Lamb Rogan Josh is one thing, but Lamb Sweetbreads Rogan Josh with Aloo Gobi Foam? That's a CombiNATION Plates thing! Craig Wong is at it again in this USA + India episode. After India, Chef moves on to the USA to answer the question, 'is everything better battered and fried?' with his Country Fried Torchon of Foie Gras. The common ingredient for these two distant nations is lobster, and really, who doesn't love it? For the US, it's Lobster with Cajun Spice Grits and Pickled Okra, and for India, check out Lobster Curry with Coconut Milk. The finale features Catfish like you've never seen it. Cooked Tandoori style and served with Collard Greens Paneer and Peach...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: Halibut is on the menu for Craig Wong's first stop in this episode of CombiNATION Plates for his Icelandic tribute, the firm, flaky fish is served with Lovage, BeÌarnaise, and Beet Glazed Turnips. Next, it's a Jamaican adventure on a plate featuring whole, soft-shell crab Escovitch, fried, doused in chili vinegar, and served with carrot meringue?! Check out the common ingredient: ice cream! With creamy Skyr style with Blueberries representing Iceland and an Avocado Lime sensation for Jamaica that only Chef Wong could pull off, made in mere moments with liquid nitrogen! The Big Dish is a you-could-only-find-it-here experience; Jamaican Jerk Spice Reindeer (yes, you read that right) served...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: If you are talking about Irish food, it's hard not to talk about Corned Beef and Cabbage. On this episode of CombiNATION Plates, Chef Craig Wong delivers his unusual take using Beef Cheek, modern technique, and a caraway-infused Carrot Terrine for fun! Next up is a tribute to Izakaya eats, featuring Tare Grilled Duck Hearts, Miso-roasted Mushroom, and Agedashi Tofu. The featured common ingredient is Oysters. For Ireland, it's Garlic GratineÌe; for Japan, check out the Kaki Yaki, oysters broiled with miso and rich Japanese Kewpie mayo. For the final dish, light up! Smoking is permitted! Check out blowtorch-seared and tableside-smoked Wagyu Beef, brushed with Irish Stout Teriyaki and...

programme.title: Zach Kinda Cooks
programme.desc: Lazy and curmudgeonly chef and ex-Gusto writer Zac cooks one of his all-time favorite dishes – Steak ‘n’ Kimchi Mac ‘n’ Cheese! While cooking, he tells aimless stories, cracks bad jokes, and berates Sydney, the beleaguered camera person.

programme.desc: Conéctate cada semana con un mensaje fresco de la palabra de Dios con una aplicación práctica para tu vida.

programme.desc: An authentic Japanese garden.

programme.title: Te Urewera National Park: New Zealand
programme.desc: Taking in the many views of Te Urewera National Park's falls, from closeups of the rapid cascades to far-away vantages from the park's highest peaks.

programme.title: Mahia Peninsula: New Zealand
programme.desc: A coastal forest on the North island's eastern coast and a deeply rooted in local Maori legend.

programme.title: Pantai Ngopet: Indonesia
programme.desc: Discover the awe-inspiring waters of Indonesia with a tour of various vacation-worthy spots.

programme.title: Wairere Falls: New Zealand
programme.desc: The Wairere Falls of New Zealand.

programme.title: Humpback Whales
programme.desc: Observe the humble humpback in all its glory. Few things are more majestic than a whale in its natural habitat: a gentle giant that inhabits every one of the world's oceans.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Med Destinations Ancona
programme.desc: Explore Ancona, a bustling port city on the Adriatic, with Med Destinations. Discover its historic landmarks, scenic waterfronts, and the unique blend of maritime tradition and modern Italian life.

programme.title: Imotska krajina
programme.desc: Imotski, known for its stunning Red and Blue Lakes, draws nature lovers and active travelers alike. During a local marenda break, host Jurica Grbavac introduced us to regional flavors—pivca and pura, a true taste of Imotski tradition.

programme.title: Med Nations 06 Spain
programme.desc: Explore Spain, a country where sun-drenched beaches converge with vibrant cities steeped in centuries of history. From the artistic avenues of Barcelona to the lively Mediterranean ports, Spain presents a dynamic blend of culture, cuisine, and coastal traditions that embody its distinctive Mediterranean spirit.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Whats on Food and Culinary Delights
programme.desc: Taste the Mediterranean this week on Whats On. Malta celebrates with Festa Frawli, the Malta International Food Festival, and Festival Ikel Malti. Slovenia serves fine dining at Gourmet Ljubljana, while Italy CousCous Festival blends flavors and cultures. Join us as we explore street food, markets, and culinary workshops that highlight the region rich gastronomic heritage.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Naples is Italy in the extreme. We’ll prowl backstreet fish markets and dodge speedy Vespas before indulging in pizza where it was invented. Afterward, we'll climb to the top of nearby Mount Vesuvius, then wander through the ruins of Pompeii, the Roman town it destroyed.

programme.title: MED Destination ITHAKA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Rimini
programme.desc: Med Destinations visits Rimini, Italy’s seaside gem, where golden beaches meet rich history. From Roman ruins to vibrant nightlife, Rimini offers the perfect mix of culture and coastal charm.

programme.title: Property in the Med Gege Gatt Panel
programme.desc: As artificial intelligence reshapes the property landscape, standing still is no longer an option. This panel explores how AI is transforming the Mediterranean real estate market—from predictive analytics and smarter valuations to automated design, marketing, and investment strategies that give early adopters a decisive edge. Beyond the tools, the discussion digs into what actually fuels AI: data, energy, infrastructure, and talent—and how these hidden drivers are redefining competition itself. By unpacking both the opportunities and the risks, this conversation reveals how forward-thinking developers, investors, and agencies can stay ahead in a market where technology is now as valuable as location.

programme.title: Med Minds 08 Hannibal
programme.desc: Hannibal, the daring general of the Mediterranean, defied empires with bold strategy and unshakable resolve.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Med Nations 06 Spain
programme.desc: Explore Spain, a country where sun-drenched beaches converge with vibrant cities steeped in centuries of history. From the artistic avenues of Barcelona to the lively Mediterranean ports, Spain presents a dynamic blend of culture, cuisine, and coastal traditions that embody its distinctive Mediterranean spirit.

programme.title: Azzurro Storie di mare: Alla scoperta di Ischia, isola verde
programme.desc: A journey along Italy’s coast, from Ponza to Calabria, exploring its natural beauty and the people who protect it. Fishermen, divers, and activists share their passion for the sea and their fight against pollution.

programme.title: Med Destinations Lake Bled
programme.desc: Step into the fairytale beauty of Lake Bled, Slovenia, on Med Destinations. Crystal-clear waters, a picturesque island church, and lush Alpine surroundings make it a serene Mediterranean escape.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: We'll explore flamboyant Sevilla, where orange trees ring lacy palaces, bullfighting is still a cultural event, and little girls dream of growing up to become flamenco dancers.

programme.title: Colours of Mediterranean Culture
programme.desc: From Malta to Greece, Mediterranean arts flourish. Valletta Baroque Festival, Malta International Arts Festival, and Birgu by Candlelight light up the island with music and heritage. Italy’s Cortona on the Move, La Fenice in Piazza San Marco, and Mercantia Festival showcase photography, opera, and street performance. France’s Art Paris and International Garden Festival, Spain’s Revela’t Festival and La Leyenda de Tartessos, Portugal’s Umbrella Sky Project and Walk & Talk Biennale, Turkey’s Istanbul Theatre Festival and Biennial, and Greece’s Athens & Epidaurus Festival highlight the Med’s rich artistic tapestry.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Athens
programme.desc: Malini explores the ancient city of Athens, Greece. Once steeped in history, Athens has experienced a modern rebirth, now thriving with creativity, modern Greek gastronomy, a vibrant contemporary art scene, and unmatched nightlife.

programme.title: Med Destinations Rimini
programme.desc: Med Destinations visits Rimini, Italy’s seaside gem, where golden beaches meet rich history. From Roman ruins to vibrant nightlife, Rimini offers the perfect mix of culture and coastal charm.

programme.title: Split (Firule)
programme.desc: In Split’s Firule neighborhood—home to Croatia’s tennis greats—we discovered more than just sport. Renowned chef Hrvoje Zirojević welcomed us with a taste of tradition: pivac na tingul, a classic Dalmatian stew made with tender young rooster.

programme.title: Io Ti Cerchero
programme.desc: Valerio uncovers a shocking truth that deepens the mystery of Ettore’s death. He discovers a conspiracy involving powerful figures, forcing him into a dangerous phase of his investigation. Determined to expose the truth, Valerio faces formidable obstacles that threaten to silence him.

programme.title: Quella cosa che non si scorda mai
programme.desc: Francesco's supermarket is in great crisis and Olivia involves the man in a rescue plan that leads them to search for local producers around Gorizia. Viola is increasingly determined to investigate her mother's past to find out who her father is and Emma is increasingly interested in Nice.

programme.title: The Odyssey Zeus Punishment
programme.desc: As punishment for his crew eating the sacred cattle of Helios, Zeus unleashes a mighty storm that destroys Ulysses’ ship, leaving him as the sole survivor adrift at sea.

programme.title: PUCCINI TU TU PICCOLO ADDIO
programme.desc: In the final moments of Madama Butterfly, Cio-Cio-San sings "Tu, tu, piccolo Iddio", a tender farewell to her son before making the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Concerto - OSN Fabio Luisi e Alexander Gadjiev Torino 2022
programme.desc: On April 28, 2022, esteemed conductor Fabio Luisi and acclaimed pianist Alexander Gadjiev took the stage at the Auditorium Rai "Arturo Toscanini" in Turin, accompanied by the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai. Gadjiev delivered a masterful performance of Chopin’s Piano Concerto No. 2, while Luisi led a captivating interpretation of Strauss’ "Aus Italien".

programme.title: Jesenice
programme.desc: In the hillside village of Staro Selo Jesenice, with views of the central Dalmatian islands, we found stone houses, a bocce court, and a traditional tavern run by Ante Bajso. There, he treated us to a Dalmatian classic—meat slow-cooked under a bell-shaped lid, peka.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Marseille
programme.desc: Malini Angelica travels to Marseille, France’s vibrant Mediterranean port city. She explores its historic Old Port, colorful neighborhoods, and bustling markets, discovering the city’s unique blend of French and North African influences. From sampling local dishes like bouillabaisse to soaking in seaside views and street art, Malini uncovers what makes Marseille one of France’s most dynamic and diverse cities.

programme.title: Tuscanys Dolce Vita
programme.desc: We enjoy the charms of rural Tuscany's "sweet life" as we hunt for truffles in an oak forest, nibble on artichokes, and cruise through cypress groves in a classic convertible.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: Enjoy the ultimate comfort meal with beer-battered fish fillets, fried to perfection, followed by a bright and colorful Niçoise salad filled with tuna, eggs, tomatoes, olives, and green beans.

This trip shows how Greece still inspires the Mediterranean and the world through its food, music, and long history.

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature EP8
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Med Destinations Ancona
programme.desc: Explore Ancona, a bustling port city on the Adriatic, with Med Destinations. Discover its historic landmarks, scenic waterfronts, and the unique blend of maritime tradition and modern Italian life.

programme.title: Split (Firule)
programme.desc: In Split’s Firule neighborhood—home to Croatia’s tennis greats—we discovered more than just sport. Renowned chef Hrvoje Zirojević welcomed us with a taste of tradition: pivac na tingul, a classic Dalmatian stew made with tender young rooster.

programme.title: Med Nations 02 Greece
programme.desc: Greece has a culture that has been shaped by hundreds of years of ideas, traditions, and life on the sea. From the ancient wonders of Athens to the sun-drenched islands of the Aegean, Greece shows this. This trip shows how Greece still inspires the Mediterranean and the world through its food, music, and long history.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Whats On Waves and Rhythms
programme.desc: From seaside beats to floating stages, this episode captures Mediterranean music by the water. Malta Boomerang Festival and Earth Garden celebrate eco conscious music and arts, while Spain Bilbao BBK fuses urban culture with live performances. Set sail on the Mediterranea Metal Cruise, a unique floating festival, and enjoy Malta iconic Jazz Festival with historic and coastal backdrops. The Mediterranean truly comes alive where music meets the waves.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: Celebrate rustic baking in this episode, starting with a flavorful olive pie cake and finishing with charming mini olive pies sprinkled with sesame seeds, perfect for sharing or snacking.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: We'll explore flamboyant Sevilla, where orange trees ring lacy palaces, bullfighting is still a cultural event, and little girls dream of growing up to become flamenco dancers.

programme.title: Med Destinations Pula
programme.desc: Discover Pula, Croatia, with Med Destinations. Famous for its Roman amphitheater and charming old town, Pula combines historical grandeur with Adriatic seaside beauty.

programme.title: Med Destinations Rimini
programme.desc: Med Destinations visits Rimini, Italy’s seaside gem, where golden beaches meet rich history. From Roman ruins to vibrant nightlife, Rimini offers the perfect mix of culture and coastal charm.

programme.title: Building for Centuries Panel
programme.desc: What does it take to build something that lasts centuries? This panel examines how sustainability, environmental awareness, and long-term thinking are reshaping architecture and development, moving beyond short-term solutions toward a legacy of resilient, future-proof spaces.

programme.title: Med Minds 06 Jean de Valette
programme.desc: Jean Parisot de Valette, the steadfast Grand Master of Malta, led the Knights with courage, defended his island, and saved Europe as we know it.

programme.title: Acqua da proteggere
programme.desc: With Marco Faimali, director of the CNR's Institute for the Study of Marine Sustainability, we explore the ocean's fragile ecosystem and the need for protection. Anna Pancaldi visits marine protected areas, including the Smart Bay of Santa Teresa and the port of La Spezia, where researchers study "alien species". Finally, we learn about the underwater internet, an innovation from Sapienza University of Rome led by Professor Chiara Petrioli and the WSENSE team.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: For many travelers, the quintessence of Spain is found in Andalucía. Join us in Granada, Córdoba, and the Costa del Sol as we enjoy the food, history, art, and dance of Europe's most passionate corner.

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Palermo
programme.desc: Malini Angelica returns to Sicily to explore Palermo, Mondello, and Agrigento. From Palermo’s vibrant markets and rich history to Mondello’s seaside charm and the ancient Greek temples of Agrigento, she uncovers the island’s unique mix of cultures, cuisine, and character that make Sicily truly one of a kind.

programme.desc: Malta, a small island nation with a big Mediterranean story. From the historic streets of Valletta to sun-soaked beaches and ancient temples, Malta reveals a vibrant blend of history, culture, and coastal life shaped by centuries of Mediterranean influence.

programme.title: Mediterraneo
programme.desc: In the heart of the Mediterranean lies a world where nature keeps some of its most breathtaking secrets. Carved between Africa, Asia, and Europe, this deep sea is home to extraordinary wildlife and waters so blue they draw visitors from across the globe. A sea that not only boasts natural beauty but also witnessed the dawn of the world’s earliest civilisations.

programme.title: Med Nations 10 Malta
programme.desc: Malta, a small island nation with a big Mediterranean story. From the historic streets of Valletta to sun-soaked beaches and ancient temples, Malta reveals a vibrant blend of history, culture, and coastal life shaped by centuries of Mediterranean influence.

programme.title: Concerto – OSN Gatti Bruckner Wagner Torino
programme.desc: In January 2022, Daniele Gatti conducted the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai at the Turin Auditorium, performing Wagner’s "Parsifal" excerpts and Bruckner’s Symphony No. 9. The programme highlighted Wagner's meditative Prelude to Act III and Good Friday Spell, followed by Bruckner’s profound Ninth Symphony, marked by its emotional depth and unfinished final movement.

programme.title: Makarska
programme.desc: In Makarska, where the Biokovo mountain meets the sea, we explored local flavors with chef Mario Tomaš. On the menu: "utisno" shark, a Venetian-influenced specialty, and njokada—a cinnamon-spiced twist on pašticada.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Amalfi
programme.desc: Malini Angelica travels to Italy’s stunning Amalfi Coast, exploring its dramatic cliffs, colorful seaside towns, and crystal-clear waters. From the charm of Positano and Amalfi to the tranquility of Ravello, she experiences the region’s beauty, cuisine, and coastal lifestyle. Malini captures the magic that makes the Amalfi Coast one of Italy’s most breathtaking destinations.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Discover the wonders of southern France as we savor Roman ruins in Nîmes, a papal palace in Avignon, Van Gogh's vivid views in Arles, and the vineyards of the Côtes du Rhône.

It's a journey through a country that has had a profound impact on art, cuisine, and culture throughout the Mediterranean and beyond.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature Ep 5
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Sabrina visits Israel and first explores Sarona, including its local market, and tries local food and wine. Her next stop is Jaffa exploring its flea market ending with Shakshuka Shushka.

programme.title: Xplore
programme.desc: Sukhmani explores Siem Reap, starting with Angkor Wat, a maze of broken columns and statues. She then visits Ta Prohm and then Angkor Thom.

programme.title: Timeless Tamil Nadu
programme.desc: Alex is introduced to Tamil Nadu through the state capital, Chennai. A colonial-era cathedral that she visits turns out to be one of the only three known churches in the world built over the tomb of an apostle of Jesus. She also finds out that a museum dedicated to the life of a saint was once used by an American businessman to store ice. She soon realizes that the city is full of hidden stories waiting to be explored.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: Bengal has not only been home to the former capital of British India but also been the land where many European colonies vied for dominance and cultural supremacy. As a result, the cuisine of the land underwent a renaissance, wherein it imbibed many European influences including Portuguese, Dutch and Danish. Alex visits what used to be a Danish settlement on the banks of the river Hooghly, and she unearths recipes, which were born from this delicious amalgamation of cultures.

programme.title: Xp Guide
programme.desc: On an island-hopping adventure in the Seychelles, Freishia finds out that every island has something unique to offer.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.desc: Tallinn, Estonia’s capital, is known for its quaint, medieval Old Town but Italian nomad couple, Marco and Erica discover other sides to the city by visiting offbeat attractions such as the Seaplane Harbour Museum and Telliskivi Creative City, a hub of artists. They also tuck into a medieval feast at Olde Hansa Inn. Following this, they have an off-roading adventure at Aidu oil shale quarry.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Sabrina visits Zodiac fountain and then Jaffa Port. She then explores National Park in Caesarea. Ending the episode as learns about Baha'i faith.

programme.title: Xplore
programme.desc: Travel along with Sukhmani to Cambodia, the land of eternal sunshine and hope, as she explores Siem Reap, the city of Angkor.

programme.title: Timeless Tamil Nadu
programme.desc: In the 8th century AD, a town on the Coromandel coast became a lab for the kings of the Pallava dynasty to conduct their architectural experiments. Centuries later, Alex visits the world-famous rock-cut temples and cave shrines of Mahabalipuram to explore the styles of architecture that were innovated by kings, who are often called the pioneers of South Indian architecture.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: The pillowy goodness of Bengali sweets is even more famous in India than some of Kolkata’s landmarks. Alex, however, sets out to discover the forgotten sweets of Bengal. She meets some veteran sweet shop owners in the city, who show her how to make some lesser-known traditional sweets.

programme.title: Xp Guide
programme.desc: Considering Singapore’s reputation as a glitzy, fast-paced, ultra-urbanized city, Sukhmani is surprised at the pockets of nature it offers.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.desc: Marco and Erica get to know about the dark history of Estonia while exploring the remains of Narva, the country’s third largest city at its easternmost limit. From the fortress of Narva and the bastions of Narva to an abandoned textile mill, everything tells them about the intriguing story of the town. They also learn about the Russian and ‘alien’ people living here.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Sabrina visits Acre, starting from El Jazzar mosque and Citadel fortress. Next day she travels to Mizpe Hayamim and then explores the town of Capernaum.

programme.title: Xplore
programme.desc: From Siem Reap to Sihanoukville, the next adventurous stop where food means spiders, crickets and cockroaches.

programme.title: Timeless Tamil Nadu
programme.desc: Alex takes a trip to Thanjavur, curious about why it has always been called “the cradle of arts”. Soon, she is lost in the magnificence of the Great Living Chola Temples, with their stunning architecture and intricate carvings, rich in symbolism. At a center for making bronze statues, she is surprised to find out how ancient is the art form. The highlight of her trip, however, is a visit to a workshop for making musical instruments, where she is treated to an impromptu performance.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: Khad Maas is a celebrated Rajasthani dish with war-time origins. Game meat used to be slow-cooked in underground pits created to ensure that the fire could not be seen by enemy troops. Due to its intricate and cumbersome preparation, the dish seldom graces tables in Rajasthan today. Alex learns how to prepare this with the cultural conservationist, Trivikram.

programme.title: Xp Guide
programme.desc: From an exciting jungle breakfast to a magical Night Safari, Sukhmani’s experiences at the Singapore Zoo make her fall in love with wildlife.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.desc: Marco and Erica soak in the vitality of the student town, Tartu, and experience its eccentricities at the Leaning House and the AHHAA Science Centre. Following this, they visit Obinista, the cultural centre of Setomaa, where the Seto community introduces them to the traditional ways of dressing, singing and dancing. They also indulge in a traditional smoke sauna at nearby Võromaa.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Sabrina is in Tiberias, known for its natural hot springs, here she visits the Sea of Galilee. In Nezareth she visits the cave of Mary, ending with Via Dolorosa in Jerusalem.

programme.title: Xplore
programme.desc: Explore the beauty of the peaceful Kohrong island of Cambodia in the wilderness of the Mangroves and the relaxing trip back to Sihanoukville.

programme.title: Timeless Tamil Nadu
programme.desc: Ooty has been known to charm visitors ever since British officers used to go there to escape the infamous Indian summer. Sipping tea at the tiered tea plantations, strolling by serene lakes and gushing waterfalls, gawking at gentle deer and majestic elephants at Mudumalai National Park, Alex loses herself in the breathtaking natural beauty of this retreat nestled in the Nilgiri hills.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: The sheer ingenuity and artistry of Rajasthani cuisine is an enduring testament to the skill and grim determination of the people who have made their homes in this largely arid land. Alex finds out that this applies to the imperial cuisine of the state as well, when she meets Trivikram and learns from him how to prepare a traditional meat dish, that was made using meat leftovers.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: From swimming in the ocean to relishing a traditional Maldivian lobster curry, Kim experiences the true meaning of joie de vivre at Reethi Rah.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: After finding his grandparents’ handwritten recipes, Vikramaditya Sodawas, the owner of Karni Fort, decided to revive his family’s prized recipes.

programme.title: Xplore
programme.desc: So far Cambodia has been seasoned with adventure, local spice and colour, now encounter ancient history of the country at the Angkor Complex.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.desc: Embracing Estonia’s largest area of swamps, meadows and waterside forests, Soomaa National Park is the second largest national park in the country. While trying out bog walking and camping over here, Marco and Erica experience what is known as the “fifth season” in Estonia, the season of floods. They also explore Tallinn’s history with espionage, and go on to soak in the romance at its Christmas Market.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: Located in the North Malé Atoll of Maldives, the Reethi Rah resort is the perfect combination of island life mixed with world-class luxury.

programme.title: Timeless Tamil Nadu
programme.desc: Kodaikanal - the name means “The Gift of the Forest”. True to its name, the cozy hill station nestled in Tamil Nadu’s Palani Hills is captivating with its verdant hills, cascading waterfalls, and postcard-perfect lakes. Alex is truly astonished, however, when she stumbles onto an observatory here that has been tracking solar activity for around 115 years!

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Sabrina in Jerusalem, takes a guided tour of City of David and visits Western Wall, learning about its significance. Ending with Cardo and Mahane Yehuda Markets.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: After finding his grandparents’ handwritten recipes, Vikramaditya Sodawas, the owner of Karni Fort, decided to revive his family’s prized recipes.

programme.title: Xplore
programme.desc: So far Cambodia has been seasoned with adventure, local spice and colour, now encounter ancient history of the country at the Angkor Complex.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Sabrina in Jerusalem, takes a guided tour of City of David and visits Western Wall, learning about its significance. Ending with Cardo and Mahane Yehuda Markets.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: Hungry for stories and flavours of a bygone kingdom, Alex meets Rana Sawai Harisingh II, the 24th descendant to the royal family of Begu.

programme.title: World Heritage
programme.desc: The rise of Buddhism in India can be traced from famous monuments such as the Mahabodhi temple complex and the Great Stupa at Sanchi.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries some of the signature spa treatments of the Shangri La Resort at Kota Kinabalu in Sabah, Malaysia.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: From Antoni Gaudi’s whims to hosting the 1992 Olympics, Alex finds out that Barcelona has been shaped by many different things.

programme.title: Mr. & Mrs. Roy on the Maharaja's Express
programme.desc: On a trip aboard the Maharajas’ Express, Rohit and Manasi find themselves taking a walk on the wild side.

programme.title: Timeless Tamil Nadu
programme.desc: A town defined by medieval grandeur, Karaikudi transports Alex to the era when affluent Chettiar merchants built splendid mansions as a status symbol. At one of these mansions, the secrets of the Chettinad cuisine, heavy on meat and heat, begin to unfold.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: Bengal has not only been home to the former capital of British India but also been the land where many European colonies vied for dominance and cultural supremacy. As a result, the cuisine of the land underwent a renaissance, wherein it imbibed many European influences including Portuguese, Dutch and Danish. Alex visits what used to be a Danish settlement on the banks of the river Hooghly, and she unearths recipes, which were born from this delicious amalgamation of cultures.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.desc: Despite the boom of the 21st century development, Tallinn, the 1000-year-old capital of Estonia, safeguards its UNESCO-listed medieval Old Town, one of Europe’s most complete walled cities. Marco Biagioli and Erica Melargo, a famous Italian nomad couple, lose themselves in its fairy-tale charms, and find out its legends. They also visit iconic attractions such as Alexander Nevsky Cathedral and Raeapteek, the oldest pharmacy in Europe that has continuously been in business in the same building.
